title: Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Woodland Consulting Pvt Ltd!
